'''fopamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:readjustable|readjustable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readjustable|readjustable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fopamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fopamithi|fopamithi]] || [[word:fopamiji|fopamiji]] || [[word:fopamishi|fopamishi]] || [[word:fopamiki|fopamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fopamuthuthu|fopamuthuthu]] || [[word:fopamujuju|fopamujuju]] || [[word:fopamushushu|fopamushushu]] || [[word:fopamukuku|fopamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fopamuthu|fopamuthu]] || [[word:fopamuju|fopamuju]] || [[word:fopamushu|fopamushu]] || [[word:fopamuku|fopamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fopamufthuf|fopamufthuf]] || [[word:fopamufjuf|fopamufjuf]] || [[word:fopamufshuf|fopamufshuf]] || [[word:fopamufkuf|fopamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fopamethe|fopamethe]] || [[word:fopameje|fopameje]] || [[word:fopameshe|fopameshe]] || [[word:fopameke|fopameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fopamothotho|fopamothotho]] || [[word:fopamojojo|fopamojojo]] || [[word:fopamoshosho|fopamoshosho]] || [[word:fopamokoko|fopamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fopamotho|fopamotho]] || [[word:fopamojo|fopamojo]] || [[word:fopamosho|fopamosho]] || [[word:fopamoko|fopamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fopamofthof|fopamofthof]] || [[word:fopamofjof|fopamofjof]] || [[word:fopamofshof|fopamofshof]] || [[word:fopamofkof|fopamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfthÃŸf|fopamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfjÃŸf|fopamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfshÃŸf|fopamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfkÃŸf|fopamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fopamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fopamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fopamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fopamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfthÃŸf|fopamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfjÃŸf|fopamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfshÃŸf|fopamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfkÃŸf|fopamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfthÃŸf|fopamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfjÃŸf|fopamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfshÃŸf|fopamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fopamÃŸfkÃŸf|fopamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fopamÃḊthÃḊ|fopamÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fopamÃḊjÃḊ|fopamÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fopamÃḊshÃḊ|fopamÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fopamÃḊkÃḊ|fopamÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fopamathatha|fopamathatha]] || [[word:fopamajaja|fopamajaja]] || [[word:fopamashasha|fopamashasha]] || [[word:fopamakaka|fopamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fopamatha|fopamatha]] || [[word:fopamaja|fopamaja]] || [[word:fopamasha|fopamasha]] || [[word:fopamaka|fopamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fopamafthaf|fopamafthaf]] || [[word:fopamafjaf|fopamafjaf]] || [[word:fopamafshaf|fopamafshaf]] || [[word:fopamafkaf|fopamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fopamasha|fopamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fopamshÃḋsha|fopamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fopamrosha|fopamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fopamusha|fopamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fopamyasha|fopamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofopamnkshÃḋsha|gofopamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofopamnkrosha|gofopamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofopamnkmusha|gofopamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofopamnkyasha|gofopamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fopapamasha|fopapamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fopapamshÃḋsha|fopapamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fopapamrosha|fopapamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fopapamusha|fopapamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fopapamyasha|fopapamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofopapamnkshÃḋsha|gofopapamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofopapamnkrosha|gofopapamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofopapamnkmusha|gofopapamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofopapamnkyasha|gofopapamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fepÃḊmasha|fepÃḊmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fepÃḊmshÃḋsha|fepÃḊmshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fepÃḊmrosha|fepÃḊmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fepÃḊmusha|fepÃḊmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fepÃḊmyasha|fepÃḊmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofepÃḊmnkshÃḋsha|gofepÃḊmnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofepÃḊmnkrosha|gofepÃḊmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofepÃḊmnkmusha|gofepÃḊmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofepÃḊmnkyasha|gofepÃḊmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fopfamasha|fopfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fopfamshÃḋsha|fopfamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fopfamrosha|fopfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fopfamusha|fopfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fopfamyasha|fopfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofopfamnkshÃḋsha|gofopfamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofopfamnkrosha|gofopfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofopfamnkmusha|gofopfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofopfamnkyasha|gofopfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
